race_meta.race_name: CopyBet Supporting UK Horse Racing EBF Junior 'National Hunt' Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner majordomo (fr) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Lucy The Wire with 38.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Lucy The Wire > Molly's Lad, but actual result was Majordomo (FR) > Molly's Lad. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
